sections.paragraph:
Original: חלץ חלץ

Transliteration: chelets chêlets

Phonetic: kheh'-lets

BDB Definition:

Helez = "he has saved"
  1. an Ephraimite, one of the 30 of David's mighty warriors, leader of the 7th monthly course
  2. a man of Judah, son of Azariah

Origin: from H2502

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
